title: S3: bee knowledge index (byte-identical, --check in chain) + bee knowledge list
action: Extend knowledge.mjs (in skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/ — SOURCE OF TRUTH, same atomic propagation as okf-1) with: (a) `index` per D21 — generates index.md at EVERY directory level inside docs/knowledge/ that contains at least one concept or subdirectory with concepts, plus the root docs/knowledge/index.md (sole carrier of okf_version frontmatter, D4; every generated index carries an HTML-comment provenance header 'GENERATED FILE — do not hand-edit… Regenerate: bee knowledge index', body = OKF §6 sections grouping concepts as linked bullet entries with descriptions from frontmatter; non-root indexes have NO frontmatter). Byte-identical for identical inputs — deterministic ordering (path sort, LF only, no timestamps). `--check` re-renders in memory and diffs against disk: any drift = non-zero exit naming stale files (the decisions.mjs render --check idiom). Also generate the critical-patterns index (D21): a patterns section listing every concept with bee.critical true — as part of the root index body (a '## Critical patterns' section), NOT a separate hand-file. (b) `list` per D15 — rows of path, bee.id, type, lifecycle, title; filters --type/--lifecycle/--area; --json; never file content. Register knowledge.index + knowledge.list in command-registry (examples must execute green for test_bee_cli); wire HANDLERS in templates/bee.mjs. RED-FIRST: extend test_knowledge.mjs with index determinism (two runs byte-identical), --check catches a doctored stale index, non-root index has no frontmatter, root keeps okf_version-only frontmatter + provenance comment, critical section lists a critical fixture concept, list filters and --json shape, empty-bundle index generates root only. Add [".bee/bin/bee.mjs","knowledge","index","--check"] to EXTRA_SUITES in scripts/run_verify.mjs and pin in MANDATORY_SUITES (test_verify_manifest.mjs) — additive only. Then the atomic propagation sequence: onboard_bee --apply, render_plugin_skill_trees, release_manifest --write, run_verify — LAST mutations before the ONE commit that sweeps everything (incl. regenerated docs/knowledge/index.md replacing the hand-seeded one; docs/knowledge/log.md gains a dated entry for the regeneration takeover).

truths: node scripts/run_verify.mjs exits 0 (now 63 suites incl. knowledge index --check)
red evidence: extended tests failed before implementation (verbatim in trace)
two consecutive `bee knowledge index` runs produce byte-identical files (diff evidence)
a doctored index.md makes `index --check` exit non-zero naming the file, then regeneration heals it (evidence in trace)
generated root index.md still satisfies check: okf_version-only frontmatter, provenance as HTML comment
list --json rows carry path,id,type,lifecycle,title and never content
prohibitions: no timestamps or wall-clock values in generated indexes (byte-identical law)
no hand-edit of .bee/onboarding.json; propagation via the sequence only

trace.outcome: bee knowledge index (byte-identical per-level generation, --check in verify chain) + bee knowledge list shipped; root docs/knowledge/index.md now generated; full 63-suite chain green
